case_title: BEATRIZ RIVAS VS. MARSHA G MAHAN

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF RIVAS, BEATRIZ AS TO DEFENDANT MAHAN, MARSHA G AKA AGENT RT MAHAN INCORPORATED CFO AND AGENT RT MAHAN INCORPORATED, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION; JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RIVAS, BEATRIZ RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MAHAN, MARSHA G AKA AGENT RT MAHAN INCORPORATED CFO AND AGENT RT MAHAN INCORPORATED, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION; $9,662.06 PRINCIPAL, $3,126.94 INTEREST, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $13,014.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
